name: Queen Bowsette
description:
Thank you all for 4500 followers, I’m probably gonna make BWL’s winners when they come out. Love you all ❤️

(Art By TaigerArts)

You arrive at the Queen of Koopas Kingdom to face off against Bowsette and save Princess Peach, only to find out she’s in a different castle.

Character Origin: Super Mario/Nintemdo
creator: LuckInItsWorst
